---
title: "Gustavo Diaz"
image: "images/profile3.png"
links:
  - label: '<i class="fas fa-envelope"></i> Email'
    url: "mailto:gustavodiaz@tulane.edu"
  - label: '<i class="fab fa-twitter"></i> Twitter'
    url: "https://twitter.com/gusvalo"
  - label: '<i class="fab fa-github"></i> GitHub'
    url: "https://github.com/gustavo-diaz"
  - label: '<i class="fab fa-google"></i> Scholar'
    url: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=TVXK8-8AAAAJ"

output:
  postcards::solana
site: distill::distill_website
---

# Welcome

I am a Postdoctoral Fellow in the [Department of Political Science](https://www.mcmaster.ca/) at [McMaster University](https://politicalscience.mcmaster.ca/). I study comparative politics and political methodology.

Substantively, I am interested in the challenges to electoral accountability and representation in the Global South. Methodologically, I develop standards to navigate research design tradeoffs in experiments and quasi-experiments.

I received my PhD from the [Department of Political Science](https://pol.illinois.edu/) at the [University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign](https://illinois.edu/) in 2021. Before joining McMaster, I was a postdoctoral fellow at the [Center for Inter-American Policy and Research](https://stonecenter.tulane.edu/cipr) at [Tulane University](https://tulane.edu/).
